title: Forbidden recipes By Anoosh
description: Forbidden Recipes is a mod that adds crafting recipes for some of Minecraft's most elusive items, including the dragon egg, barrier block, elytra, and more. This mod lets you craft powerful or rare items that were previously unobtainable in survival mode.
body:
Forbidden Recipes
Welcome to Forbidden Recipes, a mod that I created to add crafting recipes for some of Minecraft's most unique and hard-to-obtain items. Have you ever wished you could craft a dragon egg, a totem of undying, or even a barrier block? This mod makes it possible by adding new and challenging recipes for these "forbidden" items. Now you can craft your way to a complete collection without relying on rare drops or creative mode.

What's Included:

Barrier Block: Craft this invisible block to create barriers and structures that can't be seen or passed through.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89801f6fb64afe319b355b8dda89d17ce288f9e5.png)

Bedrock: You can now craft the most unbreakable block in Minecraft. While it's very expensive to make, it's a great way to secure your base.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/501a5903539d65292a1e3b5f0530c73dcbca1ae1.png)

Command Block: Get full access to the power of command blocks in survival mode by crafting them.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ad445cb87c2a2da5b9a462ac4e5c4353c5935a2.png)

Dragon Egg: This iconic item is no longer a one-time drop. Craft a new one to show off your achievements or to have as a collectible.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7da6898e48a5220487c479b15e7df2152ffd3853.png)

Elytra: No more searching for an End City! Craft a new pair of elytra to soar through your world with ease.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d807fa4696d02c783e65324f12cdd06f560fb785.png)

Enchanted Golden Apple: This powerful and rare food item can now be crafted, giving you access to its special effects whenever you need them.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81124c2aff2afd5b8a0a0add4cb51cca7e7b142e.png)

Heart of the Sea: You can now craft this rare item, which is essential for creating a conduit.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8622adfa3382042b19ed632d1d65a164ec3e17.png)

Name Tag: Never run out of name tags again! Craft them to name your mobs and pets.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b889bc3c889c3174e49f7b008e35dfc8ad80c.png)

Nether Star: The centerpiece of the beacon can now be crafted, making it easier to create your own.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ec0b53e73f0f6ba56129238c8bdf9eba720e5ae.png)

Saddle: Find your perfect mount without relying on random chest loot. Craft a saddle to ride a horse, pig, or strider.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bbe7472f19eccb6489a3875fabb2d9b06ce08e0.png)

Totem of Undying: This life-saving item can now be crafted. Craft as many as you need to protect yourself from death.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a439e84ef5df4fd58f0bbc55159ce56cb5dd63fe.png)

Trident: No more endless grinding for a trident. You can now craft this powerful weapon to use in your battles.

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd0b975c70ac0bc033d7bd929e988d5488b7dc16.png)

I hope you enjoy the new crafting possibilities this mod brings to your game!
